item.description:
# Overview

  
  
The Private Dining Lead API allows partners to create and submit private dining inquiries on behalf of guests directly to an OpenTable restaurant. Each lead is routed using the OpenTable restaurant ID (RID), ensuring the request reaches the correct venue and its private dining team.  
  
This endpoint is designed to support high-value event inquiries such as celebrations, corporate events, and group dining, helping restaurants capture demand beyond standard reservations.  
  
Posting leads is restricted to restaurants with an active Private Dining subscription.

# Private Dining Leads API

The **Private Dining Leads API** allows partners to programmatically submit private dining (PD) inquiries to **participating OpenTable restaurants**. This integration is designed for partners who capture private dining demand in their own products and want to route qualified leads directly into OpenTable’s restaurant workflows.

Because **not all restaurants support private dining**, partners must first use OpenTable’s **Directory API** to identify which restaurants have private dining enabled before attempting to post a lead.

## Overview

At a high level, the Private Dining Leads integration follows a two-step flow:

1. **Discover PD-enabled restaurants via Directory**
    
    - Call the **Directory API** to retrieve restaurant metadata for the markets and partners you support.
        
    - Use the **private dining–related attribute** in the response to determine whether a given restaurant has private dining enabled.
        
    - Only restaurants flagged as **PD-enabled** are eligible to receive private dining leads.
        
2. **Submit private dining leads for eligible restaurants**
    
    - For restaurants identified as PD-enabled, submit inquiries using the **Private Dining Lead submission endpoint**.
        
    - The lead payload should include the guest’s contact details and event requirements as defined by the endpoint’s schema.
        
    - OpenTable will route the lead to the selected restaurant so they can review and respond through their existing tools.
        

### Important considerations

- **PD availability is not universal**  
    Many restaurants in the Directory do **not** have private dining enabled. Integrations **must** respect the PD-enabled attribute to avoid submitting leads to ineligible restaurants.
    
- **Limited PD-specific metadata in Directory**  
    The Directory response **does not currently expose private dining–specific details** (such as room names, capacities, or minimums); it only indicates whether private dining is enabled. Partners should collect the necessary event details from guests in their own UI and pass them through the lead submission endpoint.
    
- **Decoupled discovery and lead submission**  
    Discovery (Directory) and lead submission (Private Dining Leads) are **separate APIs**. A typical integration will:
    
    - Periodically sync or query Directory to understand which restaurants accept private dining leads.
        
    - Store and use restaurant identifiers from Directory when posting leads to ensure they are routed correctly.
        

This design allows partners to build flexible experiences for guests while ensuring that private dining leads are only sent to restaurants that are ready to handle them through OpenTable.

item.name: Reviews API

request.description:
## Overview

This specific endpoint allows partners to obtain all the reviews by Restaurant and Date or count. You can query a single `RID` or multiple `RIDs`, if multiple, comma separated.

Endpoint:

**URL:** [https://platform.opentable.com/v1/partnerreviews/allreviews](https://platform.opentable.com/v1/partnerreviews/allreviews)

**Method:** GET

### **Query Parameters**

| Name | Type or Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `RID \\\\\\\*required` | String | Unique identifier for a restaurant (provided by OpenTable). Only one RID can be queried at a time. |
| `NumberOfReviews` | Integer | The maximum number of reviews to return. |
| `StartDate` | String | ISO 8601 start date for filtering. |
| `EndDate` | String | ISO 8601 end date for filtering. |
| `DateFilter` | String | Field to filter by. Available values: `submissionDateTimeUtc`, `dinedOnDateTimeUtc`, `lastActivityDateTimeUtc`, `lastModifiedDateTimeUtc`. |
| `SortBy` | String | Field to sort by. Available values: `submissionDateTimeUtc`, `lastActivityDateTimeUtc`, `dinedOnDateTimeUtc`. |
| `SortOrder` | String | Sorting order. Available values: `descending`, `ascending`. |
| `IncludeRatingsOnly` | Boolean | If `true`, includes reviews with only ratings. |
| `OverallRating` | String | List of rating values to filter (valid values: `1-5`). |
| `SkipReviews` | Integer | Number of reviews to skip for pagination. |
| `WithReplies` | Boolean | If `true`, includes review replies. |
| `SimplifiedModerationStates` | String | Filter reviews by moderation status. Options: `Approved`, `Rejected`, `Pending`. |
| `HasDinerReplies` | Boolean | Filter reviews based on whether they have diner replies. |

---

### **Parameters**

| Name | Type or Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Rid \\\\\\\*required` | String | List of Restaurant IDs to retrieve. |
| `NumberOfReviews` | Integer | The maximum number of reviews to return. |
| `StartDate` | String | ISO 8601 date for the start of the date range to include in the date filter. |
| `EndDate` | String | ISO 8601 date for the end of the date range to include in the date filter. |
| `DateFilter` | String | Date field to filter on. Available values: `submissionDateTimeUtc`, `dinedOnDateTimeUtc`, `lastActivityDateTimeUtc`, `lastModifiedDateTimeUtc`. |
| `SortBy` | String | Choose which date field to sort by given the sort order. Available values: `submissionDateTimeUtc`, `lastActivityDateTimeUtc`, `dinedOnDateTimeUtc`. |
| `SortOrder` | String | Available values: `descending`, `ascending`. |
| `IncludeRatingsOnly` | Boolean | Normally, only reviews with review text are included. Specify `true` to return reviews with ratings only as well. |
| `OverallRating` | String | A list of values for the overall rating of reviews to be retrieved. Valid values are `1-5`. |
| `SkipReviews` | Integer ($int32) | The number of reviews to skip – provides paging. |
| `WithReplies` | Boolean | Specify whether review replies should be included with each review. Will return `true` or `false`. |
| `SimplifiedModerationStates` | String | Specify the simplified moderation state to filter the review list on. Options: `Approved`, `Rejected`, `Pending`. |
| `HasDinerReplies` | Boolean | Specify whether to filter reviews that do or do not have review replies. |

---

### **Attributes**

| Name | Type or Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CountryCode` | String | The country in which the restaurant is located. |
| `CustomerName` | String | Name of the reviewer. |
| `CustomerNickname` | String | Nickname provided by the reviewer. |
| `CustomerEmailAddress` | String | Email address of the reviewer. |
| `DomainId` | Integer | Identifier of the domain where the reservation was booked. |
| `Featured` | Boolean | Indicates if the review is featured by the restaurant (deprecated, always returns `false`). |
| `Locale` | String | The language code of the restaurant, as an IETF language tag. |
| `Language` | String | Language of the review. |
| `MetroId` | Integer | Identifier of the metro the restaurant is located in. |
| `ModerationState` | Integer | Status of moderation in numeric value. `APPROVED=2`, `REJECTED=5`, `PENDING=8`. |
| `SimplifiedModerationState` | String | Simplified status of the review. Values: `Approved`, `Rejected`, `Pending`. |
| `Rating` | Object\[Integer\] | Object detailing the rating by category: Overall, Food, Service, Ambience, Value, Noise (values `1-5`). |
| `Recommended` | Boolean | Indicates if the reviewer recommended the restaurant. |
| `RestaurantComment` | String | Non-public note from the reviewer to the restaurant (does not appear on OpenTable.com). |
| `RestaurantId` | Integer | Unique identifier for the restaurant this review is associated with. |
| `DinedDateTime` | String | Date and time at which the guest dined at the restaurant (local time). |
| `ReservationId` | Integer | Unique identifier of the reservation for this restaurant. |
| `ReviewId` | String | Unique identifier of the review. |
| `ReviewText` | String | Text of the review left by the reviewer. |
| `ReviewTitle` | String | Title of the review. |
| `ReviewType` | Integer | Type of review; will always be `0` when coming from OpenTable. |
| `SubmissionDateTimeUtc` | String | Date and time when the guest submitted the review, expressed in Zulu (Z) time (`YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ`). |
| `CustomQuestions` | Object | Additional responses to custom questions (e.g., `Occasion`, `DiningOccasion`). |
| `NeighborhoodId` | Integer | Identifier of the neighborhood the restaurant is located in. |
| `GpId` | Integer | Unique OpenTable identifier of the guest. |
| `LastModifiedDateTimeUtc` | String | Date and time when the review was last modified (Zulu time). |
| `TagVotes` | String | Deprecated field, will return `null`. |
| `Helpfulness` | List of Objects | Score of the helpfulness of the review. |
| `UpdatedByDinerDateTimeUtc` | String | Date and time when the review was last modified by the reviewer (Zulu time). |
| `IsDraft` | Boolean | Indicates if the review is a draft (`true` or `false`). |
| `Categories` | List of Objects | List of review categories selected by the reviewer. |
| `DinerInitials` | String | Initials of the reviewer. |
| `DinerMetroId` | Integer | Metro identifier of the reviewer’s dining metro. |
| `DinerIsVip` | Boolean | Reviewer’s OpenTable VIP status (`true` or `false`). |
| `Photos` | Object | Details about any uploaded images in the review. |
| `OriginalSubmissionDateTimeUtc` | String | Date and time when the guest originally submitted the review (Zulu time). |
| `ResponseLink` | String | URL to view the review and post responses (requires OpenTable for Restaurants login). |

---

### **Categories**

| Name | Type or Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Id` | String | Category identifier. |
| `Label` | String | Category label. |

---

### **Photos**

| Name | Type or Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Type` | String | File type of photo uploaded. |
| `Key` | String | OpenTable identifier of photo. |
| `Caption` | String | Caption of the photo written by the reviewer. |
| `ShowCaption` | Boolean | Indicates if a caption is shown. Will return `true` or `false`. |

---

# **Category Key**

| **Name** | **Label** | **Diner Choice Category** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Brunch` | Great for brunch | true |
| `BusinessMeals` | Good for business meals | false |
| `Charming` | Charming | false |
| `ChildFriendly` | Kid-friendly | true |
| `DogFriendly` | Dog-friendly | false |
| `Fancy` | Fancy | false |
| `Foodies` | Innovative | true |
| `GlutenFree` | Gluten-free-friendly | false |
| `GreatBeer` | Great for craft beers | false |
| `HandcraftedCocktails` | Great for creative cocktails | false |
| `HappyHour` | Great for happy hour | false |
| `Healthy` | Healthy | false |
| `HotSpot` | Hot spot | true |
| `LiveMusic` | Great for live music | false |
| `NeighborhoodGem` | Neighborhood gem | true |
| `NotableWineList` | Great for fine wines | true |
| `OutdoorDining` | Great for outdoor dining | true |
| `Romance` | Romantic | true |
| `Groups` | Good for Groups | true |
| `ScenicView` | Great for scenic views | true |
| `SpecialOccasions` | Good for special occasions | true |
| `Vegan` | Vegan-friendly | false |
| `VegetarianOptions` | Vegetarian-friendly | false |
| `VibrantBarScene` | Lively | true |

request.description:
## Overview:

This API allows you to retrieve a summary for a given Restaurant Id filtered with the given parameters for the past 120 days.

Endpoint:

**URL:** {{base-url}}/v1/partnerreviews/restaurantreviewsummary  
**Method:** GET

## **Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Rids` | `string` | Single `RID` or List of `RIDs`. If multiple `RIDs`, comma separated. |

---

Here is the formatted version of your data into tables:

### **Attributes**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RestaurantReviewSummaries | array | Restaurant review summary details by RID. |

---

### **Restaurant Review Summaries**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Rid | integer | A unique identifier for the restaurant this reservation is associated with. |
| Ratings | array | Details of rating summary of all reviews. |
| RatingOnlyReviewRatings | array | Details of rating summary of rating-only reviews. |
| CategoryDistribution | array | List of review categories and counts selected by reviewer. |
| TotalNumberOfReviews | integer | Total number of reviews within the look-back period. |
| AllTimeTextReviewCount | integer | All-time count of reviews with text. |
| ShowReviews | boolean | This value has been deprecated. Expected answer is true. |
| StartDateUtc | string | The date and time of the look-back period, expressed in Zulu (Z) time (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ). |
| Awards | array | List of Diner’s Choice categories and counts awarded to the restaurant. |
| RestaurantName | string | Name of restaurant. |
| Locale | string | The language code of the restaurant, as an IETF language tag. |
| LookBackDays | integer | Number of days in the look-back period. |
| RatingBasedOn | string | This will equal RecentReviews, AllTime, or NoReviews depending on the review count. |
| VerifiedReviews | boolean | Indicates if the reviews summarized are verified (true or false). |
| ResponseLink | string | A URL to view the review and post responses (requires OpenTable for Restaurants login). |

---

### **Ratings**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| OverallRatingsDistribution | object | Rating distribution of review score. |
| DinersRecommendations | object | Count and recommendation status. |
| Count | integer | Total counts of reviews within the look-back period. |
| Overall | object | Rating average and count of all reviews. |
| Food | object | Rating average and count of food scores. |
| Service | object | Rating average and count of service scores. |
| Ambience | object | Rating average and count of ambience scores. |
| Value | object | Rating average and count of value scores. |
| Noise | object | Rating average and count of noise scores (1-4: Do not recall, Quiet, Moderate, Energetic). |

---

### **RatingOnlyReviewRatings**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| OverallRatingsDistribution | object | Rating distribution of rating-only reviews. |
| DinersRecommendations | object | Count and recommendation status of rating-only reviews. |
| Count | integer | Total counts of rating-only reviews. |
| Overall | object | Rating average and count of rating-only reviews. |
| Food | object | Rating average and count of food scores. |
| Service | object | Rating average and count of service scores. |
| Ambience | object | Rating average and count of ambience scores. |
| Value | object | Rating average and count of value scores. |
| Noise | object | Rating average and count of noise scores (1-4: Do not recall, Quiet, Moderate, Energetic). |

---

### **Category Distribution**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Name | integer | Category name. |
| Count | integer | Total count of category. |
| Key | integer | Category label. |

---

### **Awards**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Name | integer | Category name. |
| Count | integer | Total count of category. |
| Key | integer | Category label. |

---

### **Overall Ratings Distribution**

| Rating | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | integer | Count of rating 1. (1-5 scale, 1 being the lowest, 5 the highest). |
| 2 | integer | Count of rating 2. |
| 3 | integer | Count of rating 3. |
| 4 | integer | Count of rating 4. |
| 5 | integer | Count of rating 5. |

---

### **Diners Recommendations**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Count | integer | Total count of diner recommendations. |
| Yes | integer | Total number of Yes counts. |
| No | integer | Total number of No counts. |

---

### **Overall Ratings**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Rating | integer | Average score of the overall rating. |
| Count | integer | Total count of overall rating scores. |

---

### **Noise Ratings**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Rating | integer | Rating average and count of noise scores. (1-4: Do not recall, Quiet, Moderate, Energetic). |
| Count | integer | Total count of overall rating scores. |

request.description:
# Reviews Response API Documentation

## Overview

The **Reviews API POST Endpoint** allows partners to respond to OpenTable diner reviews for a specific Restaurant ID (**RID**). Note that OpenTable reviews can only be posted by confirmed seated diners.

---

## Endpoint

**URL:** {{base-url}} /v1/partnerreviews/reviewreplies/{reviewId}  
**Method:** POST

---

## **Request Parameters**

### **Path Parameters**

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| reviewId | string | Yes | Unique identifier of the review. |

### **Query Parameters**

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| rid | integer ($int32) | Yes | Restaurant Identifier. |

### **Request Body** (Case-Sensitive)

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Message | string | Yes | The response body; the message sent to the reviewer. |
| From | string | Yes | Should always be **"Restaurant"**. |
| Name | string | No | Name of the respondent (typically the restaurant's name). |
| IsPublic | boolean | Yes | **true**: Message is posted on OpenTable.com (only one allowed). **false**: Message is sent privately to the reviewer (multiple messages allowed). |
| ReplyingToReplyId | string | No | Used for private responses (`IsPublic=false`) when replying to a specific response. |
| ReplyToEmail | string | No | The reviewer's email address. |

item.description:
## Overview

The OpenTable Reviews API provides partners access to diner reviews for restaurants. Reviews are only posted by confirmed seated diners, ensuring authenticity. This API enables retrieval of all reviews for a specific restaurant and provides summary statistics.

These reviews are also exposed on the OpenTable profile page for each restaurant.

item.name: Sync APIs

request.description:
# Overview

The Reservation API provides detailed data about restaurant reservations and allows applications to filter and retrieve records based on various parameters. This endpoint is designed to support restaurant management systems and third-party applications in obtaining accurate and timely reservation data.

---

### API Endpoint

**URL**: `https://platform.opentable.com/sync/v2/reservations`

**Method:** GET

## Request Details

### Headers

| **Header** | **Value** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Content-Type` | `application/json` | Specifies that the request body contains JSON data. |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer [AccessToken]` | A valid access token for authenticating the request. |

### Query Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rid` | string | A unique, static identifier for each restaurant. Required |
| `guest_id` | string | A unique identifier, per RID, for a guest. This is represented in the payload attribute with the removal of the leading RID designation. I.e., if the payload returned, “guest_id”: “214390-5b0ed185cdff96138419db0f”, the query parameter to isolate all records for the specific guest would be ?rid=214390&guest_id=5b0ed185cdff96138419db0f. |
| `confirmation_id` | string | Filter results by confirmation ID. |
| `state` | string | Filter results by reservation state (e.g., `Done`, `Seated`, `Cancelled`). |
| `scheduled_time_from` | string | Lower boundary of the reservation scheduled date/time range in local time(ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) |
| `scheduled_time_to` | string | Upper boundary of the reservation scheduled date/time range in local time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) |
| `updated_after` | string | Retrieve reservations updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) |
| `limit` | integer | Number of results per request. Default is 1000, maximum number available for return is 2000. |
| `offset` | integer | Number of results to skip. Use for pagination. |

### Response Structure

The response is a JSON object containing metadata about pagination and an array of guest objects.

### Response Attributes

| **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `hasNextPage` | boolean | Indicates if there are additional pages of results. |
| `nextPageUrl` | string or null | URL for the next page of results, if available. |
| `offset` | integer | The starting offset for the current page. |
| `limit` | integer | The maximum number of records returned in this response. |
| `items` | array | An array of reservation objects containing detailed information about each reservation. |

### Response Payload

The response includes metadata about the paginated results, followed by an array of reservation objects.

---

### Reservation Object Attributes

---

| Attribute | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Unique identifier for the reservation. |
| href | string (URL) | Fully qualified URL for the reservation. |
| rid | integer | Unique identifier for the restaurant. |
| sequence_id | integer | Internal reservation identifier. |
| guest_id | string | Unique identifier for the guest. |
| guest | string (URL) | URL reference to the guest. |
| confirmation_id | integer | Reservation confirmation number. |
| state | string | Current reservation status. |
| table_number | array\[string\] | Assigned table number or numbers. |
| created_date | datetime | Reservation creation timestamp in local time. |
| scheduled_time | datetime | Scheduled reservation time in local time. |
| party_size | integer | Number of guests in the party. |
| visit_tags | array\[string\] | Visit tags applied to the reservation. |
| origin | string | Reservation origin, such as Web, Walk-in, or Phone. |
| updated_at | datetime | Last updated timestamp in local time. |
| seated_time | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as seated in local time. |
| done_time | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as done in local time. |
| pos_data.check_ids | array\[string\] | Nested object. POS check identifiers associated with the reservation. |
| pos_data.pos_sub_total | integer | Nested object. POS subtotal amount. |
| pos_data.pos_tax | integer | Nested object. POS tax amount. |
| pos_data.pos_tip | integer | Nested object. POS tip amount. |
| pos_data.pos_total_spend | integer | Nested object. POS total spend amount. |
| scheduled_time_utc | datetime | Scheduled reservation time in UTC. |
| guest_request | string | Special request entered by the guest. |
| venue_notes | string, nullable | Notes entered by the restaurant on the reservation. |
| opentable_notes | string | OpenTable notes or special offer details associated with the reservation. |
| table_category | string, nullable | Table type or seating option for the reservation. |
| seated_time_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as seated in UTC. |
| done_time_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as done in UTC. |
| updated_at_utc | datetime | Last updated timestamp in UTC. |
| server | string, nullable | Server assigned to the reservation. |
| arrived_time | datetime | Time the diner was checked in, in local time. |
| arrived_time_utc | datetime | Time the diner was checked in, in UTC. |
| currency_code | string, nullable | Restaurant currency code used with POS values. |
| currency_denominator | integer | Denominator used to calculate currency amounts. |
| experience_details.experience_id | integer | Nested object. Unique identifier for the experience. |
| experience_details.experience_title | string | Nested object. Experience title. |
| experience_details.experience_description | string | Nested object. Experience description. |
| experience_details.subtotalAmount | integer | Nested object. Experience subtotal amount. |
| experience_details.add_ons | array, nullable | Nested object. Experience add-ons. |
| experience_details.addon_subtotal_amount | integer | Nested object. Add-on subtotal amount. |
| experience_details.diner_payment_status | string, nullable | Nested object. Diner payment status. |

request.description:
# OpenTable Guest Sync API Documentation ## Overview The OpenTable Guest Sync API allows users to retrieve detailed information about guest profiles associated with a restaurant. --- ## Endpoint **URL**: `{{base-url}}/sync/v2/guests` **Method:** GET ## Request Details ### Headers | **Header** | **Value** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | `Content-Type` | `application/json` | Specifies that the request body contains JSON data. | | `Authorization` | `Bearer [AccessToken]` | A valid access token for authenticating the request. | ### Query Parameters: | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | `rid` | integer | A unique, static identifier for each restaurant. Required | | `updated_after` | string | Retrieve guests updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) | | `offset` | integer | The starting point for pagination. Default is `0`. | | `limit` | integer | The maximum number of guests to return per request. Default is `1000`, maximum number available for return is `2000`. | ### Response Structure The response is a JSON object containing metadata about pagination and an array of guest objects. ### Response Attributes | **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | `hasNextPage` | boolean | Indicates if there are additional pages of results. | | `nextPageUrl` | string | URL for the next page of results, if available. | | `offset` | integer | The starting offset for the current page. | | `limit` | integer | The maximum number of records returned in this response. | | `items` | array | An array of guest objects containing detailed information about each guest. | ### Guest Object Attributes | Attribute | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | id | string | Unique identifier for the guest by restaurant. | | href | string (URL) | Fully qualified URL for the guest. | | rid | integer | Unique identifier for the restaurant associated with the guest. | | sequence_id | integer | Internal OpenTable identifier for the guest record. | | gpid | string | Unique OpenTable identifier for the guest. | | tags | array\[string\] | Guest tags applied to the diner profile. | | birth_date.name | string | Nested object. Label for the birth date field. | | birth_date.year | integer | Nested object. Birth year. | | birth_date.month | integer | Nested object. Birth month. | | birth_date.day | integer | Nested object. Birth day. | | anniversary_date.name | string | Nested object. Label for the anniversary date field. | | anniversary_date.year | integer | Nested object. Anniversary year. | | anniversary_date.month | integer | Nested object. Anniversary month. | | anniversary_date.day | integer | Nested object. Anniversary day. | | updated_at | datetime | Last updated timestamp in local time. | | forgotten | boolean | Indicates whether the guest requested to have their data forgotten. | | archived | boolean | Indicates whether the guest profile is archived. | | company_name | string, nullable | Company name associated with the guest. | | created_date | datetime | Timestamp when the guest profile was created in local time. | | updated_at_utc | datetime | Last updated timestamp in UTC. | | notes | string | Restaurant-entered diner identity information. | | notes_special_relationship | string | Restaurant-entered information about the guest’s special relationship to the restaurant, chef, or group. | | notes_food_and_drink | string | Restaurant-entered food and drink preferences or dietary notes. | | notes_seating | string | Restaurant-entered seating preferences. | | created_date_utc | datetime | Timestamp when the guest profile was created in UTC. | --- ## Error Response for Guests ### Error Messaging The error response DTO returned by the Sync API collections are in the below format. When reporting issues, always provide the OT-RequestId (located in the response header) to allow OpenTable to uniquely identify a specific request. | PARAMETER | DESCRIPTION | | --- | --- | | **timestamp**
`integer` | The unix time stamp of the error. | | **path**
`string` | The end path of the API you are calling. | | **status**
`integer` | The numerical 3 digit code associated to the error. E.g., 400, 404, 409. | | **error**
`string` | The descriptive phrase associated to the error. E.g., Bad Request, Unauthorized, Not Found. | | **message**
`string` | A short user-readable description of the error. |

request.description:
## **Overview**

The Reservation Webhook API provides real-time updates about changes in reservation status via webhooks. These updates enable restaurants to seamlessly integrate reservation management into their systems. The webhooks send a detailed JSON payload containing reservation attributes whenever a reservation status changes.

To access Guest Data, please use the `guest` attribute to call the guest endpoint in Sync API. For more information about Sync API and other available data points via the GET query, please refer to the Sync API tier section of this Portal.

### **Change Log**

**** The v3 version of the webhook, released in February 2025 ****

## **Data Delivery Method**

### **Webhook Implementation**

Webhooks are triggered on any change in reservation status. A POST request is sent to the specified endpoint with the payload data.

#### **Configuring Your Endpoint**

- Endpoint URL: Provide an URL where webhook data will be delivered.
    
    - **Webhook URL must use https and port 443**
        
- Authentication: Basic or bearer token is required to verify authenticity of request
    
- Event Handling: Ensure your system handles retries in case of delivery failures.
    

#### **Retry Logic**

Webhook delivery uses an exponential backoff strategy. After three failed attempts, the webhook is marked as undeliverable.

## **Attributes**

The webhook payload will not include the same attributes as available in the GET query. To get the additional attributes not delivered in the webhook, Sync API reservataions endpoint will need to be called. Please see the Sync API Copper Reservations API v2 documention for full list of additional attributes.

OpenTable reserves the right to update the data sent via the webhook with additional attributes. POS partner should build their ingestion of the webhook to accept any new additional attributes in the future. Partner can choose to process or ignore the additional attributes.

The webhook payload includes the following attributes:

| **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `sequence_id` | integer | Sequential identifier for the reservation record within OpenTable systems. |
| `guest_id` | string | The unique guest identifier for the restaurant. |
| `confirmation_id` | integer | A confirmation ID for the reservation. |
| `state` | string | The current state of the reservation. States are: NotConfirmed, LeftMessage, WrongNumber, NoAnswer, Confirmed, Late, PartiallyArrived, AllArrived, PartiallySeated, Seated, Appetizer, Entree, Dessert, CheckDropped, Paid, Cleared, BusTable, Done, NoShow, Cancelled, AssumedSeated, AssumedDone. |
| `table_number` | array | The table number(s) assigned to the reservation. |
| `scheduled_time` | string | The scheduled date and time of the reservation (local time). |
| `party_size` | integer | The number of guests in the reservation. |
| `server` | string | The server assigned to the reservation. |
| `updated_at_utc` | string | Timestamp of the last update to the reservation (UTC time). |
| `id` | string | A globally unique identifier for the reservation. |
| `href` | string | A fully qualified URL for the reservation. |
| `rid` | integer | A unique identifier for the restaurant this reservation is associated with. |
| `guest` | string | A fully qualified URL for the guest associated with the reservation. |
| `created_date` | string | Timestamp of when the reservation was created (local time). |
| `visit_tags` | array | Visit tags that were applied to the reservation by the restaurant (custom or default). |
| `seated_time` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Seated` (local time). |
| `done_time` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Done`. (local time) |
| `scheduled_time_utc` | string | The scheduled date and time of the reservation (UTC time). |
| `guest_request` | string | The special requests entered by the diner when making their reservation. |
| `venue_notes` | string | Notes entered by the venue regarding the reservation. |
| `opentable_notes` | string | The details of the special offer selected by the diner. |
| `table_category` | string | The table type, or seating option, for the reservation. Options are: “hightop,bar,counter,outdoor”. Note: If the attribute is ‘null’, the table_category will be the “default” attribute. |
| `seated_time_utc` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Seated` (UTC time). |
| `done_time_utc` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Done`. (UTC time) |
| `created_date_utc` | string | Timestamp of when the reservation was created (UTC time). |
| `updated_at` | string | Timestamp of the last update to the reservation (local time). |
| `origin` | string | The origin source of the reservation (e.g., `Phone`, `Web, Walk-in`). |
| `arrived_time` | string | Timestamp of when the host checked in the diner and the reservation to the status of arrived or partially arrived. (local time). |
| `arrived_time_utc` | string | Timestamp of when the host checked in the diner and the reservation to the status of arrived or partially arrived. (UTC time). |
| `experience_details` | object | Experience details object including the following details: experience_id (integer),experience_title (string), experience_description (string), subtotalAmount (integer), add_ons (array \[ItemID (string), Quantity (integer), Price (integer), LineTotal (integer), LineSubtotalWithTaxes (integer), TaxAmount (integer), Name (string), Description (string), CurrencyDenominator (integer), Taxes (array \[TaxID (integer), Label (string), TaxPercent (integer), TaxOnItemAmount (integer)\])\]), addon_subtotal_amount (integer), diner_payment_status (string), service_fee_amount (integer), taxes_amount (integer), tip_amount (integer), total_amount (integer). |
| `deposit_details` | object | Details of any deposit made. Includes totalPaid, totalRefunded, currency, currencyDenominator, and status (e.g., Paid, FullRefund). |

Required | | `email_optin` | boolean | List searches to guests that have the email optin flag set to true or false | | `updated_after` | string | Retrieve guests updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) | | `offset` | integer | The starting point for pagination. Label for the birth date field. | | birth_date.year | integer | Nested object. Birth year. | | birth_date.month | integer | Nested object. Birth month. | | birth_date.day | integer | Nested object. Anniversary day. | | updated_at | datetime | Last updated timestamp in local time. | | forgotten | boolean | Indicates whether the guest requested to have their data forgotten. | | archived | boolean | Indicates whether the guest profile is archived. | | primary_guest | string (URL), nullable | URL of the primary guest when this guest record is archived. | | address | object, nullable | Nested object. Indicates whether this is the primary phone number. | | created_date | datetime | Timestamp when the guest profile was created in local time. | | updated_at_utc | datetime | Last updated timestamp in UTC. | | marketing_opted_out | boolean | Indicates whether the guest opted out of OpenTable marketing/data sharing beyond operational needs. | | notes | string | Restaurant-entered diner identity information. | | notes_special_relationship | string | Restaurant-entered information about the guest’s special relationship to the restaurant, chef, or group. | | notes_food_and_drink | string | Restaurant-entered food and drink preferences or dietary notes. | | notes_seating | string | Restaurant-entered seating preferences. | | created_date_utc | datetime | Timestamp when the guest profile was created in UTC. | | date_last_visit | datetime | Most recent visit timestamp in local time. | | date_first_visit | datetime | First recorded visit timestamp in local time. | | date_last_visit_utc | datetime | Most recent visit timestamp in UTC. | | date_first_visit_utc | datetime | First recorded visit timestamp in UTC. | ## Error Response for Guests ### Error Messaging The error response DTO returned by the Sync API collections are in the below format. When reporting issues, always provide the OT-RequestId (located in the response header) to allow OpenTable to uniquely identify a specific request. | PARAMETER | DESCRIPTION | | --- | --- | | **timestamp**
`integer` | The unix time stamp of the error. | | **path**
`string` | The end path of the API you are calling. | | **status**
`integer` | The numerical 3 digit code associated to the error. E.g., 400, 404, 409. | | **error**
`string` | The descriptive phrase associated to the error. E.g., Bad Request, Unauthorized, Not Found. | | **message**
`string` | A short user-readable description of the error. |

request.description:
# Overview

The Reservation API provides detailed data about restaurant reservations and allows applications to filter and retrieve records based on various parameters. This endpoint is designed to support restaurant management systems and third-party applications in obtaining accurate and timely reservation data.

---

### API Endpoint

**URL**: `https://platform.opentable.com/sync/v2/reservations`

**Method:** GET

## Request Details

### Headers

| **Header** | **Value** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Content-Type` | `application/json` | Specifies that the request body contains JSON data. |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer [AccessToken]` | A valid access token for authenticating the request. |

### Query Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rid` | string | A unique, static identifier for each restaurant. Required |
| `guest_id` | string | A unique identifier, per RID, for a guest. This is represented in the payload attribute with the removal of the leading RID designation. I.e., if the payload returned, “guest_id”: “214390-5b0ed185cdff96138419db0f”, the query parameter to isolate all records for the specific guest would be ?rid=214390&guest_id=5b0ed185cdff96138419db0f. |
| `confirmation_id` | string | Filter results by confirmation ID. |
| `state` | string | Filter results by reservation state (e.g., `Done`, `Seated`, `Cancelled`). |
| `scheduled_time_from` | string | Lower boundary of the reservation scheduled date/time range in local time(ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) |
| `scheduled_time_to` | string | Upper boundary of the reservation scheduled date/time range in local time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) |
| `updated_after` | string | Retrieve reservations updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) |
| `limit` | integer | Number of results per request. Default is 1000, maximum number available for return is 2000. |
| `offset` | integer | Number of results to skip. Use for pagination. |

### Response Structure

The response is a JSON object containing metadata about pagination and an array of guest objects.

### Response Attributes

| **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `hasNextPage` | boolean | Indicates if there are additional pages of results. |
| `nextPageUrl` | string | URL for the next page of results, if available. |
| `offset` | integer | The starting offset for the current page. |
| `limit` | integer | The maximum number of records returned in this response. |
| `items` | array | An array of reservation objects containing detailed information about each reservation. |

### Response Payload

The response includes metadata about the paginated results, followed by an array of reservation objects.

---

| Attribute | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Unique identifier for the reservation. |
| href | string (URL) | Fully qualified URL for the reservation. |
| rid | integer | Unique identifier for the restaurant. |
| sequence_id | integer | Internal reservation identifier. |
| guest_id | string | Unique identifier for the guest. |
| guest | string (URL) | URL reference to the guest. |
| confirmation_id | integer | Reservation confirmation number. |
| state | string | Current reservation status. |
| table_number | array\[string\] | Assigned table number or numbers. |
| created_date | datetime | Reservation creation timestamp in local time. |
| scheduled_time | datetime | Scheduled reservation time in local time. |
| party_size | integer | Number of guests in the party. |
| visit_tags | array\[string\] | Visit tags applied to the reservation. |
| origin | string | Reservation origin, such as Web, Walk-in, or Phone. |
| updated_at | datetime | Last updated timestamp in local time. |
| seated_time | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as seated in local time. |
| done_time | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as done in local time. |
| scheduled_time_utc | datetime | Scheduled reservation time in UTC. |
| marketing_opted_out | boolean | Indicates whether the diner opted out of marketing or data sharing beyond operational needs. |
| guest_request | string | Special request entered by the guest. |
| venue_notes | string, nullable | Notes entered by the restaurant on the reservation. |
| opentable_notes | string | OpenTable notes or special offer details associated with the reservation. |
| table_category | string, nullable | Table type or seating option for the reservation. |
| seated_time_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as seated in UTC. |
| done_time_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as done in UTC. |
| created_date_utc | datetime | Reservation creation timestamp in UTC. |
| updated_at_utc | datetime | Last updated timestamp in UTC. |
| server | string, nullable | Server assigned to the reservation. |
| referrer | object, nullable | Nested object. Referrer details associated with the reservation. |
| added_to_waitlist | datetime, nullable | Time the record was added to the waitlist in local time. |
| added_to_waitlist_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the record was added to the waitlist in UTC. |
| arrived_time | datetime | Time the diner was checked in, in local time. |
| arrived_time_utc | datetime | Time the diner was checked in, in UTC. |
| currency_code | string, nullable | Restaurant currency code used with POS values. |
| currency_denominator | integer | Denominator used to calculate currency amounts. |

request.description:
## **Overview**

The Reservation Webhook API provides real-time updates about changes in reservation status via webhooks. These updates enable restaurants to seamlessly integrate reservation management into their systems. The webhooks send a detailed JSON payload containing reservation attributes whenever a reservation status changes.

To access Guest Data, please use the `guest` attribute to call the guest endpoint in Sync API. For more information about Sync API and other available data points via the GET query, please refer to the Sync API tier section of this Portal.

### **Change Log**

**** The v3 version of the webhook, released in February 2025 ****

## **Data Delivery Method**

### **Webhook Implementation**

Webhooks are triggered on any change in reservation status. A POST request is sent to the specified endpoint with the payload data.

#### **Configuring Your Endpoint**

- Endpoint URL: Provide an URL where webhook data will be delivered.
    
    - **Webhook URL must use https and port 443**
        
- Authentication: Basic or bearer token is required to verify authenticity of request
    
- Event Handling: Ensure your system handles retries in case of delivery failures.
    

#### **Retry Logic**

Webhook delivery uses an exponential backoff strategy. After three failed attempts, the webhook is marked as undeliverable.

## **Attributes**

The webhook payload will not include the same attributes as available in the GET query. To get the additional attributes not delivered in the webhook, Sync API reservations endpoint will need to be called. Please see the Sync API Reservations v2 documentation for full list of additional attributes.

OpenTable reserves the right to update the data sent via the webhook with additional attributes. POS partner should build their ingestion of the webhook to accept any new additional attributes in the future. Partner can choose to process or ignore the additional attributes.

The webhook payload includes the following attributes:

| **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `sequence_id` | integer | Sequential identifier for the reservation record within OpenTable systems. |
| `guest_id` | string | The unique guest identifier for the restaurant. |
| `confirmation_id` | integer | A confirmation ID for the reservation. |
| `state` | string | The current state of the reservation. States are: NotConfirmed, LeftMessage, WrongNumber, NoAnswer, Confirmed, Late, PartiallyArrived, AllArrived, PartiallySeated, Seated, Appetizer, Entree, Dessert, CheckDropped, Paid, Cleared, BusTable, Done, NoShow, Cancelled, AssumedSeated, AssumedDone. |
| `table_number` | array | The table number(s) assigned to the reservation. |
| `scheduled_time` | string | The scheduled date and time of the reservation (local time). |
| `party_size` | integer | The number of guests in the reservation. |
| `server` | string | The server assigned to the reservation. |
| `updated_at_utc` | string | Timestamp of the last update to the reservation (UTC time). |
| `id` | string | A globally unique identifier for the reservation. |
| `href` | string | A fully qualified URL for the reservation. |
| `rid` | integer | A unique identifier for the restaurant this reservation is associated with. |
| `guest` | string | A fully qualified URL for the guest associated with the reservation. |
| `created_date` | string | Timestamp of when the reservation was created (local time). |
| `visit_tags` | array | Visit tags that were applied to the reservation by the restaurant (custom or default). |
| `seated_time` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Seated` (local time). |
| `done_time` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Done`. (local time) |
| `scheduled_time_utc` | string | The scheduled date and time of the reservation (UTC time). |
| `guest_request` | string | The special requests entered by the diner when making their reservation. |
| `venue_notes` | string | Notes entered by the venue regarding the reservation. |
| `opentable_notes` | string | The details of the special offer selected by the diner. |
| `table_category` | string | The table type, or seating option, for the reservation. Options are: “hightop,bar,counter,outdoor”. Note: If the attribute is ‘null’, the table_category will be the “default” attribute. |
| `seated_time_utc` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Seated` (UTC time). |
| `done_time_utc` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Done`. (UTC time) |
| `created_date_utc` | string | Timestamp of when the reservation was created (UTC time). |
| `updated_at` | string | Timestamp of the last update to the reservation (local time). |
| `origin` | string | The origin source of the reservation (e.g., `Phone`, `Web, Walk-in`). |
| `arrived_time` | string | Timestamp of when the host checked in the diner and the reservation to the status of arrived or partially arrived. (local time). |
| `arrived_time_utc` | string | Timestamp of when the host checked in the diner and the reservation to the status of arrived or partially arrived. (UTC time). |
| `deposit_details` | object | Details of any deposit made. Includes totalPaid, totalRefunded, currency, currencyDenominator, and status (e.g., Paid, FullRefund). |
| `referrer` | list of objects | The information associated to the referrer, or commonly the concierge, associated to a reservation. company: name of the company of the referrer (string), id: unique ID of the referrer in the OpenTable system (string), first_name: the first name of the referrer (string), last_name: the last name of the referrer (string), email: the email address of the referrer (string), phone: the phone number of the referrer (string). |
| `added_to_waitlist` | string | Timestamp of when a record was added to the waitlist. If the record was not added, the value will be null. (local time). |
| `added_to_waitlist_utc` | string | Timestamp of when a record was added to the waitlist. If the record was not added, the value will be null. (UTC time). |

request.description:
# OpenTable Guest Sync API Documentation ## Overview These APIs give approved restaurant developers the ability to acquire and consume guest data. The Sync API is currently not included in the public developer program. Inquiries sent to our team will be considered on a case by case basis. --- ## Endpoint **URL**: `{{base-url}}/sync/v2/guests` **Method:** GET ## Request Details ### Headers | **Header** | **Value** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | `Content-Type` | `application/json` | Specifies that the request body contains JSON data. | | `Authorization` | `Bearer [AccessToken]` | A valid access token for authenticating the request. | ### Query Parameters: | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | `rid` | integer | A unique, static identifier for each restaurant. Required | | `email_optin` | boolean | List searches to guests that have the email optin flag set to true or false | | `updated_after` | string | Retrieve guests updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) | | `offset` | integer | The starting point for pagination. Default is `0`. | | `limit` | integer | The maximum number of guests to return per request. Default is `1000`, maximum number available for return is `2000`. | ### Response Structure The response is a JSON object containing metadata about pagination and an array of guest objects. ### Response Attributes | **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | `hasNextPage` | boolean | Indicates if there are additional pages of results. | | `nextPageUrl` | string | URL for the next page of results, if available. | | `offset` | integer | The starting offset for the current page. | | `limit` | integer | The maximum number of records returned in this response. | | `items` | array | An array of guest objects containing detailed information about each guest. | ### Guest Object Attributes | Attribute | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | id | string | Unique identifier for the guest by restaurant. | | href | string (URL) | Fully qualified URL for the guest. | | rid | integer | Unique identifier for the restaurant associated with the guest. | | sequence_id | integer | Internal OpenTable identifier for the guest record. | | gpid | string | Unique OpenTable identifier for the guest. | | first_name | string | Guest first name. | | last_name | string | Guest last name. | | email | string | Primary email address associated with the guest. | | email_optin | boolean | Indicates whether the guest has opted into email marketing. | | phone | string | Primary phone number associated with the guest. | | phone_type | string | Type of phone number, such as mobile, home, or work. | | tags | array\[string\] | Guest tags applied to the diner profile. | | birth_date.name | string | Nested object. Label for the birth date field. | | birth_date.year | integer | Nested object. Birth year. | | birth_date.month | integer | Nested object. Birth month. | | birth_date.day | integer | Nested object. Birth day. | | anniversary_date.name | string | Nested object. Label for the anniversary date field. | | anniversary_date.year | integer | Nested object. Anniversary year. | | anniversary_date.month | integer | Nested object. Anniversary month. | | anniversary_date.day | integer | Nested object. Anniversary day. | | updated_at | datetime | Last updated timestamp in local time. | | forgotten | boolean | Indicates whether the guest requested to have their data forgotten. | | archived | boolean | Indicates whether the guest profile is archived. | | primary_guest | string (URL), nullable | URL of the primary guest when this guest record is archived. | | address | object, nullable | Nested object. Guest address information. | | mail_opted_in | boolean | Indicates whether the guest opted into physical mail. | | company_name | string, nullable | Company name associated with the guest. | | phone_numbers\[\].label | string | Nested array object. Phone label. | | phone_numbers\[\].number | string | Nested array object. Phone number. | | phone_numbers\[\].country_code | string | Nested array object. Country code. | | phone_numbers\[\].primary | boolean | Nested array object. Indicates whether this is the primary phone number. | | created_date | datetime | Timestamp when the guest profile was created in local time. | | updated_at_utc | datetime | Last updated timestamp in UTC. | | marketing_opted_out | boolean | Indicates whether the guest opted out of OpenTable marketing/data sharing beyond operational needs. | | notes | string | Restaurant-entered diner identity information. | | notes_special_relationship | string | Restaurant-entered information about the guest’s special relationship to the restaurant, chef, or group. | | notes_food_and_drink | string | Restaurant-entered food and drink preferences or dietary notes. | | notes_seating | string | Restaurant-entered seating preferences. | | created_date_utc | datetime | Timestamp when the guest profile was created in UTC. | | date_last_visit | datetime | Most recent visit timestamp in local time. | | date_first_visit | datetime | First recorded visit timestamp in local time. | | date_email_opt_in_opt_out | datetime, nullable | Timestamp of when the email_optin value last changed in local time. | | date_last_visit_utc | datetime | Most recent visit timestamp in UTC. | | date_first_visit_utc | datetime | First recorded visit timestamp in UTC. | | date_email_opt_in_opt_out_utc | datetime, nullable | Timestamp of when the email_optin value last changed in UTC. | --- ## Error Response for Guests ### Error Messaging The error response DTO returned by the Sync API collections are in the below format. When reporting issues, always provide the OT-RequestId (located in the response header) to allow OpenTable to uniquely identify a specific request. | PARAMETER | DESCRIPTION | | --- | --- | | **timestamp**
`integer` | The unix time stamp of the error. | | **path**
`string` | The end path of the API you are calling. | | **status**
`integer` | The numerical 3 digit code associated to the error. E.g., 400, 404, 409. | | **error**
`string` | The descriptive phrase associated to the error. E.g., Bad Request, Unauthorized, Not Found. | | **message**
`string` | A short user-readable description of the error. |

request.description:
# Overview

The Reservation API provides detailed data about restaurant reservations and allows applications to filter and retrieve records based on various parameters. This endpoint is designed to support restaurant management systems and third-party applications in obtaining accurate and timely reservation data.

---

### API Endpoint

**URL**: `https://platform.opentable.com/sync/v2/reservations`

**Method:** GET

## Request Details

### Headers

| **Header** | **Value** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Content-Type` | `application/json` | Specifies that the request body contains JSON data. |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer [AccessToken]` | A valid access token for authenticating the request. |

### Query Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rid` | string | A unique, static identifier for each restaurant. Required |
| `guest_id` | string | A unique identifier, per RID, for a guest. This is represented in the payload attribute with the removal of the leading RID designation. I.e., if the payload returned, “guest_id”: “214390-5b0ed185cdff96138419db0f”, the query parameter to isolate all records for the specific guest would be ?rid=214390&guest_id=5b0ed185cdff96138419db0f. |
| `confirmation_id` | string | Filter results by confirmation ID. |
| `state` | string | Filter results by reservation state (e.g., `Done`, `Seated`, `Cancelled`). |
| `scheduled_time_from` | string | Lower boundary of the reservation scheduled date/time range in local time(ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) |
| `scheduled_time_to` | string | Upper boundary of the reservation scheduled date/time range in local time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) |
| `updated_after` | string | Retrieve reservations updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) |
| `limit` | integer | Number of results per request. Default is 1000, maximum number available for return is 2000. |
| `offset` | integer | Number of results to skip. Use for pagination. |

### Response Structure

The response is a JSON object containing metadata about pagination and an array of guest objects.

### Response attributes

| Attribute | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| hasNextPage | boolean | Indicates whether additional pages of results are available. |
| nextPageUrl | string | null |
| offset | integer | Result offset used for pagination. |
| limit | integer | Max number of items requested/returned per page. |
| items | array | List of reservations. |

---

## Reservation (object) attributes

---

| Attribute | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Unique identifier for the reservation. |
| href | string (URL) | Fully qualified URL for the reservation. |
| rid | integer | Unique identifier for the restaurant. |
| sequence_id | integer | Internal reservation identifier. |
| guest_id | string | Unique identifier for the guest. |
| guest | string (URL) | URL reference to the guest. |
| confirmation_id | integer | Reservation confirmation number. |
| state | string | Current reservation status. |
| table_number | array\[string\] | Assigned table number or numbers. |
| created_date | datetime | Reservation creation timestamp in local time. |
| scheduled_time | datetime | Scheduled reservation time in local time. |
| party_size | integer | Number of guests in the party. |
| visit_tags | array\[string\] | Visit tags applied to the reservation. |
| origin | string | Reservation origin, such as Web, Walk-in, or Phone. |
| updated_at | datetime | Last updated timestamp in local time. |
| seated_time | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as seated in local time. |
| done_time | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as done in local time. |
| pos_data.check_ids | array\[string\] | Nested object. POS check identifiers associated with the reservation. |
| pos_data.pos_sub_total | integer | Nested object. POS subtotal amount. |
| pos_data.pos_tax | integer | Nested object. POS tax amount. |
| pos_data.pos_tip | integer | Nested object. POS tip amount. |
| pos_data.pos_total_spend | integer | Nested object. POS total spend amount. |
| scheduled_time_utc | datetime | Scheduled reservation time in UTC. |
| marketing_opted_out | boolean | Indicates whether the diner opted out of marketing or data sharing beyond operational needs. |
| guest_request | string | Special request entered by the guest. |
| venue_notes | string, nullable | Notes entered by the restaurant on the reservation. |
| opentable_notes | string | OpenTable notes or special offer details associated with the reservation. |
| table_category | string, nullable | Table type or seating option for the reservation. |
| seated_time_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as seated in UTC. |
| done_time_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the reservation was marked as done in UTC. |
| created_date_utc | datetime | Reservation creation timestamp in UTC. |
| updated_at_utc | datetime | Last updated timestamp in UTC. |
| server | string, nullable | Server assigned to the reservation. |
| referrer | object, nullable | Nested object. Referrer details associated with the reservation. |
| added_to_waitlist | datetime, nullable | Time the record was added to the waitlist in local time. |
| added_to_waitlist_utc | datetime, nullable | Time the record was added to the waitlist in UTC. |
| email | string | Email address of the guest. |
| sms_opt_in | boolean, nullable | Indicates whether the diner opted into SMS. |
| arrived_time | datetime | Time the diner was checked in, in local time. |
| arrived_time_utc | datetime | Time the diner was checked in, in UTC. |
| quoted_wait_time | integer | Quoted wait time in minutes. |
| online_source | string | Source of reservation if it originated online. |
| discovery_type | string | Indicates whether the booking was direct or discovery-based. |
| partner | string, nullable | Booking partner name if reservation was made via a third party on the OpenTable network. |
| campaign_details | string, nullable | Campaign metadata. |
| credit_card_status | string, nullable | Credit card status for the reservation. |
| cancellation_date | datetime, nullable | First cancellation timestamp in local time. |
| cancellation_date_utc | datetime, nullable | First cancellation timestamp in UTC. |
| rest_ref_campaign_name | string | Restaurant referral campaign name. |
| rest_ref_id | string, nullable | Restaurant referral campaign identifier. |
| rest_ref_source | string | Restaurant referral campaign source. |
| currency_code | string, nullable | Restaurant currency code used with POS values. |
| currency_denominator | integer | Denominator used to calculate currency amounts. |
| experience_details.experience_id | integer | Nested object. Unique identifier for the experience. |
| experience_details.experience_title | string | Nested object. Experience title. |
| experience_details.experience_description | string | Nested object. Experience description. |
| experience_details.subtotalAmount | integer | Nested object. Experience subtotal amount. |
| experience_details.add_ons | array, nullable | Nested object. Experience add-ons. |
| experience_details.addon_subtotal_amount | integer | Nested object. Add-on subtotal amount. |
| experience_details.diner_payment_status | string, nullable | Nested object. Diner payment status. |
| experience_details.service_fee_amount | integer | Nested object. Service fee amount. |
| experience_details.taxes_amount | integer | Nested object. Tax amount. |
| experience_details.tip_amount | integer | Nested object. Tip amount. |
| experience_details.total_amount | integer | Nested object. Total amount. |
| experience_details.experience_type | string | Nested object. Experience type. |
| experience_details.experience_details | string | Nested object. Detailed experience information. |
| experience_details.experience_cost | integer | Nested object. Base experience cost. |
| experience_details.experience_add_on_cost | integer | Nested object. Experience add-on cost. |
| experience_details.experience_prepayment_status | string, nullable | Nested object. Experience prepayment status. |
| experience_details.experience_service_charges | integer | Nested object. Experience service charges. |
| experience_details.experience_tax | integer | Nested object. Experience tax amount. |
| experience_details.experience_gratuity | integer | Nested object. Experience gratuity amount. |
| experience_details.experience_total_cost | integer | Nested object. Total experience cost. |
| experience_details.price_type | string | Nested object. Experience pricing model. |
| experience_details.price_details\[\].price_id | integer | Nested array object. Price identifier. |
| experience_details.price_details\[\].price_name | string, nullable | Nested array object. Price name. |
| experience_details.price_details\[\].price_per_guest | integer | Nested array object. Price per guest. |
| experience_details.price_details\[\].number_of_guests | integer | Nested array object. Number of guests for that price. |
| deposit.total_paid | integer, nullable | Nested object. Total deposit paid. |
| deposit.total_refunded | integer, nullable | Nested object. Total deposit refunded. |
| deposit.currency | string | Nested object. Deposit currency. |
| deposit.currency_denominator | integer | Nested object. Deposit currency denominator. |
| deposit.status | string, nullable | Nested object. Deposit status. |
| ot_boost_type | string | Type of OpenTable Boost campaign applied. |

request.description:
## Overview

The POS Data API enables seamless integration between OpenTable and point-of-sale (POS) systems. By leveraging this API, restaurants can access detailed POS data for reservations, including subtotal, tax, tip, total spend, and individual order items. The API supports advanced filtering and pagination for efficient data retrieval.

---

## Endpoint

**URL**: `{{base-url}}/sync/v2/pos-data`

**Method:** GET

## Request Details

### Headers

| **Header** | **Value** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Content-Type` | `application/json` | Specifies that the request body contains JSON data. |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer [AccessToken]` | A valid access token for authenticating the request. |

---

## Query Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rid` | string | Limit results to a specific restaurant. |
| `confirmation_id` | string | Filter results by confirmation ID. |
| `scheduled_time_from` | string | Lower boundary of reservation scheduled date/time range (format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) Required |
| `scheduled_time_to` | string | Upper boundary of reservation scheduled date/time range (format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`). (local time) Required |
| `updated_after` | string | Retrieve orders updated after a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format: `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`) using the `updated_at_utc` timestamp (UTC time) |
| `limit` | integer | Number of results per request. |
| `offset` | integer | Number of results to skip. |

---

## Response Body

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `hasNextPage` | Boolean | Indicates if there is another page of results. |
| `nextPageUrl` | String/Null | URL for the next page of results, if available. |
| `offset` | Integer | The offset value for the current set of results. |
| `limit` | Integer | The number of results returned in the response. |
| `items` | Array | A list of items representing individual transactions. |

---

### Item Array

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | String | Unique identifier for the reservation. |
| `rid` | Integer | A unique identifier for the restaurant this order is associated with. |
| `guest_id` | String/Null | Guest ID if available, otherwise null. |
| `confirmation_id` | Integer | Confirmation ID for the transaction. |
| `currency_code` | String | Currency code (e.g., USD). |
| `currency_denominator` | Integer | Denominator for currency conversion. |
| `check_ids` | Array\[String\] | List of check identifiers associated with the transaction. |
| `pos_sub_total` | Integer | Point-of-sale subtotal before tax and tip. |
| `pos_tax` | Integer | Point-of-sale tax amount. |
| `pos_tip` | Integer | Point-of-sale tip amount. |
| `pos_total_spend` | Integer | Total amount spent including tax and tip. |
| `pos_order_items` | Array | List of order items associated with the transaction. |

---

### POS Order Item Object

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | String | Name of the ordered item. |
| `quantity` | Integer | Quantity of the ordered item. |
| `comment` | String | Additional comments about the order item. |
| `price_per_unit` | Integer | Price per unit of the item in minor currency units. |
| `ticket_item_modifiers` | String | Any modifiers applied to the item, if available. |

---

### Notes

- **Currency Handling:** The `currency_denominator` represents the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD). Divide monetary values by `currency_denominator` to get the full amount.
    
- **Item Uniqueness:** Each `id` is unique to an individual transaction.
    
- **Optional Fields:** Fields like `guest_id`, `nextPageUrl`, `comment`, and `ticket_item_modifiers` can be null, indicating missing data.
    

---

## Error Codes

| **Status Code** | **Message** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `400` | Bad Request | The request is invalid or malformed. |
| `401` | Unauthorized | Invalid or expired access token. |
| `403` | Forbidden | The client does not have permission to access this resource. |
| `404` | Not Found | The requested resource could not be found. |
| `500` | Internal Server Error | An unexpected error occurred on the server. |

---

request.description:
## **Overview**

The Reservation Webhook API provides real-time updates about changes in reservation status via webhooks. These updates enable restaurants to seamlessly integrate reservation management into their systems. The webhooks send a detailed JSON payload containing reservation attributes whenever a reservation status changes.

To access Guest Data, please use the `guest` attribute to call the guest endpoint in Sync API. For more information about Sync API and other available data points via the GET query, please refer to the Sync API tier section of this Portal.

### **Change Log**

**** The v3 version of the webhook, released in February 2025 ****

## **Data Delivery Method**

### **Webhook Implementation**

Webhooks are triggered on any change in reservation status. A POST request is sent to the specified endpoint with the payload data.

#### **Configuring Your Endpoint**

- Endpoint URL: Provide an URL where webhook data will be delivered.
    
    - **Webhook URL must use https and port 443**
        
- Authentication:
    
    - Basic or bearer token is required to verify authenticity of request
        
    - Code: Added as path parameter, no authentication mode needed if using this method
        
- Event Handling: Ensure your system handles retries in case of delivery failures.
    

#### **Retry Logic**

Webhook delivery uses an exponential backoff strategy. After three failed attempts, the webhook is marked as undeliverable.

## **Attributes**

The webhook payload will not include the same attributes as available in the GET query. To get the additional attributes not delivered in the webhook, Sync API reservations endpoint will need to be called. Please see the Sync API Reservations v2 documentation for full list of additional attributes.

OpenTable reserves the right to update the data sent via the webhook with additional attributes. POS partner should build their ingestion of the webhook to accept any new additional attributes in the future. Partner can choose to process or ignore the additional attributes.

The webhook payload includes the following attributes:

| **Attribute** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `sequence_id` | integer | Sequential identifier for the reservation record within OpenTable systems. |
| `guest_id` | string | The unique guest identifier for the restaurant. |
| `confirmation_id` | integer | A confirmation ID for the reservation. |
| `state` | string | The current state of the reservation. States are: NotConfirmed, LeftMessage, WrongNumber, NoAnswer, Confirmed, Late, PartiallyArrived, AllArrived, PartiallySeated, Seated, Appetizer, Entree, Dessert, CheckDropped, Paid, Cleared, BusTable, Done, NoShow, Cancelled, AssumedSeated, AssumedDone. |
| `table_number` | array | The table number(s) assigned to the reservation. |
| `scheduled_time` | string | The scheduled date and time of the reservation (local time). |
| `party_size` | integer | The number of guests in the reservation. |
| `server` | string | The server assigned to the reservation. |
| `updated_at_utc` | string | Timestamp of the last update to the reservation (UTC time). |
| `id` | string | A globally unique identifier for the reservation. |
| `href` | string | A fully qualified URL for the reservation. |
| `rid` | integer | A unique identifier for the restaurant this reservation is associated with. |
| `guest` | string | A fully qualified URL for the guest associated with the reservation. |
| `created_date` | string | Timestamp of when the reservation was created (local time). |
| `visit_tags` | array | Visit tags that were applied to the reservation by the restaurant (custom or default). |
| `seated_time` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Seated` (local time). |
| `done_time` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Done`. (local time) |
| `scheduled_time_utc` | string | The scheduled date and time of the reservation (UTC time). |
| `guest_request` | string | The special requests entered by the diner when making their reservation. |
| `venue_notes` | string | Notes entered by the venue regarding the reservation. |
| `opentable_notes` | string | The details of the special offer selected by the diner. |
| `table_category` | string | The table type, or seating option, for the reservation. Options are: “hightop,bar,counter,outdoor”. Note: If the attribute is ‘null’, the table_category will be the “default” attribute. |
| `seated_time_utc` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Seated` (UTC time). |
| `done_time_utc` | string | Timestamp when the reservation state changed to `Done`. (UTC time) |
| `created_date_utc` | string | Timestamp of when the reservation was created (UTC time). |
| `updated_at` | string | Timestamp of the last update to the reservation (local time). |
| `origin` | string | The origin source of the reservation (e.g., `Phone`, `Web, Walk-in`). |
| `arrived_time` | string | Timestamp of when the host checked in the diner and the reservation to the status of arrived or partially arrived. (local time). |
| `arrived_time_utc` | string | Timestamp of when the host checked in the diner and the reservation to the status of arrived or partially arrived. (UTC time). |
| `deposit_details` | object | Details of any deposit made. Includes totalPaid, totalRefunded, currency, currencyDenominator, and status (e.g., Paid, FullRefund). |
| `referrer` | list of objects | The information associated to the referrer, or commonly the concierge, associated to a reservation. company: name of the company of the referrer (string), id: unique ID of the referrer in the OpenTable system (string), first_name: the first name of the referrer (string), last_name: the last name of the referrer (string), email: the email address of the referrer (string), phone: the phone number of the referrer (string). |
| `added_to_waitlist` | string | Timestamp of when a record was added to the waitlist. If the record was not added, the value will be null. (local time). |
| `added_to_waitlist_utc` | string | Timestamp of when a record was added to the waitlist. If the record was not added, the value will be null. (UTC time). |
| `sms_opt_in` | boolean | If the diner has opted into SMS. True or False (Currently status will be null for all entries). |
| `quoted_wait_time` | integer | Number of minutes quoted for the waitlist by the host. |
| `cancellation_date` | string | Timestamp of when a record was cancelled. If the record was not cancelled, the value will be null. (local time). |
| `cancellation_date_utc` | string | Timestamp of when a record was cancelled. If the record was not cancelled, the value will be null. (UTC time). |
